notes: STUB — values committed are those well-published on NXP's i.MX 93 product page and in the IMX93HDG; per-variant peripheral counts and the orderable SKU list are pending the user-supplied exact hardware configuration.
i.MX 93 has *no GPU* — that's a deliberate split with i.MX 95.  Display path is LCDIF + MIPI DSI (no 2D GPU acceleration).

Companion silicon on the ALP Lab E1M-i.MX93 SoM (per the OneDrive datasheet folder): NXP PCA9451A PMIC; Murata Type 2DL / 2EL / 2KL / 2LL Wi-Fi 6 + BLE 5.x combo (variant TBD); IW610 Wi-Fi 6 module — confirm which combo ships on which SKU when the user writes the exact HW config.
Reference docs available locally: IMX93HDG.pdf (Hardware Design Guide, 42 p), IMX93RM.pdf (Reference Manual Rev. 6, 5593 p), AN14413.pdf (PCA9451A PMIC application note).

Peripheral counts (`peripherals: {}`) intentionally empty — the v1 schema accepts that.  Fill in once the user confirms which i.MX 93 SKU the E1M-i.MX93 SoM is built around (i.MX 9301 / 9302 / 9311 / 9312 / 9352).
Orderable variants list (`variants: []`) intentionally empty — same reason.
